calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jan-25-2010 Off Calendar

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Nov-23-2009 Continued To Feb-05-10 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 212

Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Off Calendar Nov-24-2009 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Dept. 218, Comm. William R. Gargano, Clerk: Kevin Dougherty, CSR: Lois Jones, #3689.

Michael A. Mooney, Esq. appeared for plaintiff Wind River Systems, Inc.
David Lam, Credit Manager for plaintiff, was placed under oath and examined.
No appearance by defendant Aquest Systems Corporation, a corporation.
Default was entered against defendant on August 13, 2009.
Doe defendants were dismissed on October 5, 2009.

After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of Plaintiff Wind River Systems, Inc., and against the Defaulted Defendant Aquest Systems Corporation, a corporation, as follows:

Damages/Principal - $105,949.79.
Prejudgment Interest - $20,321.36.
Attorney Fees - $7,500.00.
Costs - $455.00, for a total judgment in the amount of $134,266.15.

Judgment was submitted to and signed by the Court.

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Sep-21-2009 Continued To Dec-04-09 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 212

PROOF OF SERVICE ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Aug-10-2009 Off Calendar
